/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/csvview_qt6.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,csvview_qt6.wlx -o csvview_qt6.wlx CMakeFiles/csvview_qt6.dir/csvview_qt6_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csvview_qt6.dir/src/plugin.cpp.o  wlxbase_wlqt/libwlxbase_wlqt.a /usr/lib/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.11.1 wlxbase_wlqt/enca-1.19/lib/.libs/libenca.a -lglib-2.0 -ldl /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
